Maritime Emergency Coordination

When things get serious, structure and a clear contact person are essential.

In an emergency, every minute counts – and at the same time, calm, overview, and clean coordination are needed. MareSphere supports small and medium-sized shipowners as well as individual ship owners in remaining capable of acting in critical situations and initiating the right steps in a sensible sequence.

Central Contact in an Emergency:

You have a fixed contact point that sorts procedures, bundles information, and helps involve the right service providers, authorities, and partners.

Coordination of Measures:

Support in organizing and coordinating technical interventions, shipyard contacts, surveyors, or other service providers – with a focus on keeping processes traceable and documentable.

Documentation and Follow-up:

Accompanying support in compiling essential information and documents, e.g., for insurance, internal evaluation, or subsequent audits.

MareSphere does not replace an average adjuster or specialized authority but provides structure, relief, and an overview – especially where internal resources are limited or routine in crisis situations is lacking.

Shipping connects. Even in emergencies, MareSphere ensures that the right information and parties come together – so you don't face complex decisions alone.
